tour.title: Application Entry Point
tour.description: Start with the application bootstrap and screen registration flow.

tour.title: State And Backend Services
tour.description: Inspect the shared app state and service clients that connect the kiosk to APIs, MQTT, and hardware.

tour.title: Rental Screen Flow
tour.description: Follow the user-facing rental screens from plan and size selection through phone, payment, and success states.

tour.title: Configuration And Resources
tour.description: Review runtime configuration and Qt resources that shape the kiosk deployment.

tour.title: Tests
tour.description: Use the tests to see expected behavior for state, configuration, formatting, GPIO, API calls, and rental flow decisions.
